name: Systems Under Pressure Tutorial Script
description: Step-by-step guidance for the advanced tutorial about system coupling and collapse.

steps.title: A Realm in Peril
steps.message: This domain is wounded — its foundations crumble and the team is stretched thin. In DDDnD, when scores drop below critical thresholds, the system enters a collapse state that weakens everything you do. Study the score bars: your challenge begins here.

steps.title: A Tempting Shortcut
steps.message: Sometimes you must deliver despite a crumbling system. Play Push Through the Crunch — it wins stakeholder favor but exhausts the team and damages system health. Watch what happens when scores cross critical thresholds.

steps.title: The Curse of Coupling
steps.message: Team Capacity and System Health have both fallen below their critical thresholds — collapse warnings are now active! When a score collapses, positive gains to coupled scores are diminished. The system's rot drags everything down with it.

steps.title: Diminished Magic
steps.message: Look at your scrolls carefully — some positive effects now show reduced values. That's coupling at work: your incantations are weakened because the underlying system is unstable. You must stabilize the foundation before you can make real progress.

steps.title: Debts Come Due
steps.message: Quick patches cast in haste often conjure future debts. If Architectural Aftershocks are inbound, they represent delayed consequences of past choices. In the real quests, managing this tension — short-term survival versus long-term health — is where strategy lives.

steps.title: Breaking the Curse
steps.message: To escape a collapse, you must raise the fallen score above its threshold. Play Rest the Team to invest in recovery — it won't dazzle the stakeholders, but it will lift Team Capacity out of collapse and restore your scrolls' full potency.

steps.title: Trial by Fire Complete!
steps.message: You've survived the crucible of system coupling. In the real quests, these forces create deep strategic tension — you cannot simply optimize one dimension and neglect the rest. The realm demands balance, and balance demands wisdom. Onward, Architect!
